{{Quote|We Care. So You Don't Have To.|Dynamic Automata's slogan|<ref name="PA" />}}
'''Dynamic Automata''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] circuitry design and manufacturing corporation. It was founded and owned by [[Metron Besk]], who obtained a contract with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to supply them with parts and subsystems. After Besk's death, control of the company passed to his daughter, [[Elta Besk|Elta]].

{{Company-stub}}
